raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX i received a text from Citibank notifying me a fraudulent activity. I canceled the card. A new one was issued and submitted a dispute. Because I was honest and said the card was in my possession, which it was theyve determined that I made these charges. The charges were not made near my home and I have not used the credit cards since XX/XX/2023. Because I was honest and said I had the card in my possession. Theyve determined I made these charges. 

I will pay the charges because I dont want them reported to our credit reporting agency, but Citibank is wrong. I did not make the charges and theyre the ones that notified me of them. Please give me back my money.
